public_reputation: Recognized as a chief magistrate of regional weight.
appearance: Practical layers, inspection tools, and a habit of carrying evidence or notes keep inquiry visibly close at hand.
manner: Asks more than they answer, preserving doubt until the evidence can bear weight. In Transpolity, that reads as someone boundary-crossing and adaptive, speaking to whichever audience or protocol is presently in front of them, and the habits of a chief magistrate still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of chief magistrate in and around Velvet Pinnacle Hall, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Velvet Pinnacle Hall workable through the obligations of chief magistrate while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Transpolity.
hidden_pressure: Must keep evidence and interpretation aligned while rival interests try to redirect the inquiry. Around Velvet Pinnacle Hall, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of chief magistrate visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Magistrate Zethraxis Coilspire can share a strong lead if the party retrieves testimony, material proof, or a missing intermediary.
Magistrate Zethraxis Coilspire needs discreet assistance following contradictory evidence, frightened witnesses, or a lead too politically awkward to pursue openly in Velvet Pinnacle Hall.
Working with Magistrate Zethraxis Coilspire can place the party inside an active inquiry where every answer creates new exposure.
Magistrate Zethraxis Coilspire needs help with a problem in Velvet Pinnacle Hall that larger systems have pushed down onto ordinary hands.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained. Appearance extended under V28_8 from role/locality/public-signal derivation rather than decorative fabrication.
public_signal: Questioning silence, inspection habits, and careful note-taking make Magistrate Zethraxis Coilspire look like inquiry before accusation.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Velvet Pinnacle Hall: inquiry rooms, witness routes, guarded evidence sites, or contested scenes
who_seeks_them_out: those needing a problem solved quietly
